project_metadata.visual_style_summary: string — one paragraph describing the overall visual identity
color_palette: string — specific color descriptions, e.g. 'deep teal (#2A6B6B)', 'burnt orange (#CC5500)', 'charcoal black (#1A1A1A)'

characters.label: string — short identifier used in shot board, e.g. 'singer_main'
characters.role: string — narrative role, e.g. 'primary performer', 'love interest', 'symbolic figure'
characters.prompt_fragment: string — the exact injectable description. Example: 'woman, early 30s, dark brown shoulder-length wavy hair, angular jawline, light brown skin, fitted black turtleneck, dark indigo jeans, minimal silver necklace, intense focused expression'
characters.negative_prompt_fragment: string — what to exclude for this character. Example: 'no glasses, no hat, no tattoos, no bright colors in clothing, no smiling'

wardrobe_variants.context: string — when this variant is used, e.g. 'chorus and bridge sections — outdoor rooftop'
wardrobe_variants.prompt_fragment: string — the variant description. Example: 'same woman, dark brown shoulder-length wavy hair, angular jawline, light brown skin, loose white linen shirt untucked, same dark indigo jeans, wind-blown hair, relaxed expression'

acceptable_variation.hair: string — e.g. 'minor variation in wave pattern acceptable, length and color must be consistent'
acceptable_variation.face: string — e.g. 'jawline shape and skin tone must match, minor expression changes expected'
acceptable_variation.clothing: string — e.g. 'exact garments must match within a wardrobe variant, minor wrinkle/fold variation acceptable'
acceptable_variation.overall: string — e.g. 'must be recognizable as the same person across all shots. 80%+ facial similarity to reference image required.'

reference_images: string — file paths to committed reference images, e.g. 'refs/singer_main_front_v2.png'

locations.label: string — short identifier used in shot board, e.g. 'stage_dark'
locations.prompt_fragment: string — the exact injectable description. Example: 'dark empty stage, single overhead spotlight creating a harsh pool of light center stage, black void background, scuffed wooden floor, faint dust particles in the light beam, no audience visible'
locations.negative_prompt_fragment: string — e.g. 'no crowd, no daylight, no colorful lighting, no visible walls or ceiling'

lighting_rules.key_light: string — e.g. 'single hard overhead spot, warm white (3200K)'
lighting_rules.fill: string — e.g. 'minimal — deep shadows, near-silhouette on shadow side'
lighting_rules.color_temperature: string — e.g. 'warm 3200K key, no color gels'

acceptable_variation.spatial: string — e.g. 'stage dimensions can vary, floor texture can vary, the key constraint is the single spotlight in darkness'
acceptable_variation.lighting: string — e.g. 'spotlight intensity can vary slightly, must remain single-source harsh lighting'

props.label: string — e.g. 'vintage_microphone'
props.prompt_fragment: string — e.g. 'vintage silver ribbon microphone on a straight black stand, slightly worn metallic finish'
appears_in_shots: string — shot IDs or section labels where this prop is present

camera_style.default_lens_tendency: string — e.g. '35mm-50mm equivalent, shallow depth of field on close-ups, deeper on wides'
camera_style.default_movement_quality: string — e.g. 'smooth and deliberate, no handheld shake except in breakdown section'
camera_style.prompt_fragment: string — injectable camera style note. Example: 'cinematic shallow depth of field, film grain, 35mm lens feel, smooth controlled camera movement'

global_negative_prompts: string — negative constraints that apply to ALL shots. Example: 'no text, no watermark, no logos, no borders, no split screen, no cartoon style, no anime, no oversaturated colors, no lens flare, no Dutch angle unless specified'
do_not_show: string — specific items/concepts that must never appear. Example: 'blood', 'weapons', 'children', 'brand logos', 'modern smartphones'
